name: bash
description: Run a command via the system shell and return compact text. Prefer Atelier read/grep/search where possible; use bash for git, make, uv, npm, etc. Don't spawn nested interactive shells.

action.description: run (default): execute `command`. poll/cancel: act on a background `session_id`.

command.description: Shell command to execute (action=run). Blocked: bash/sh/zsh/fish, rm -rf, git reset --hard, git clean -fd. Rewritten transparently: cat→read, rg/grep→grep tool.

session_id.description: Handle from a background run; required for poll/cancel.

name: codemod
description: AST-shape search and rewrite via ast-grep. Matches structure, not text (formatting-safe; ignores strings/comments). `$X` = one node, `$$$` = list; e.g. pattern `$X == None`, rewrite `$X is None`. Scope with `language`/`glob`. `dry_run=true` (default) previews a diff, false applies. Returns matches (snippet, path, line); with rewrite: diff + files_changed.

name: edit
description: Apply many mechanical edits across files in one deterministic call. Each edit is a descriptor in `edits`; all must share a family. Families: file replace, create, line-scoped (`path='foo.py#10-20'`), notebook cell, symbol, projection -- exact shapes in inputSchema. Returns compact `{applied}` ranges confirming exact writes; failures stay structured. Re-read only after a fuzzy match or when changed content is needed.

projection_mapping.description: Mapping returned by a compact read with include_meta=true.

projected_ranges.description: Multiple non-overlapping exact spans from the same mapping; each item replaces one span.

atomic.description: Roll back all edits if any one fails.

hooks.description: Run formatter/linter on touched files; error/warning diagnostics appear in the result.

name: explore
description: Code intelligence by concept or symbol. Concept mode: `query` returns grouped source + caller/callee/usage context. Targeted mode: `relation` (callers/callees/usages/self) + `symbol` returns that relation (SCIP). `depth` extends transitively; `seed_files` biases concept mode.

name: grep
description: Search files with regex, glob, and type filters: matching, path listing, context lines, summaries, or incremental reruns. Set mode='file_paths_with_content' to discover AND read matched context in one step.

path.description: Workspace path; single file may carry '#start-end' (e.g. 'store.py#60-100') to scope.

regex.description: Regex to match contents. Omit for path/type listings.

glob.description: Globs constraining candidate files (e.g. `src/**/*.py`). List or bare string.

mode.description: Default ranked_file_map = navigation pointers; file_paths_with_content adds matched lines + context.

summary.description: Omit: auto-summarize large Python/JS/TS. `true`: signatures-only. `false`: raw lines.

name: memory
description: Memory op-dispatch for fact storage/voting and recall.

op.description: recall/recall_symbol need query; store_fact needs subject+fact+citations+reason+scope; vote_fact needs fact+direction+reason.

k.description: Max results to return for recall.

subject.description: Fact subject for store_fact (for example: testing, workflow preference).

fact.description: Exact fact text for store_fact and vote_fact.

reason.description: Detailed rationale for store_fact and vote_fact.

name: read
description: Read a file (or batch) with automatic source projection. Modes: outline (default for files >200 LOC), range (range='L42-L118' or 'L42-'), full (expand=true), compact. Batch 2+ files via files=[{path, range?}, ...].

path.description: Workspace-relative path; may carry a '#start-end'/'#line' suffix (e.g. 'store.py#60-100'). For 2+ files use `files`.

files.description: ['path', ...] or [{path, range?, expand?, lines?}, ...]. Returns {files: [...]}. Use for 2+ files.

name: search
description: Search code and docs by ranked query: relevance-ranked snippets or repo maps seeded from known files. Use mode='symbol' to locate a symbol's definition by name (exact, indexed; name + location, no body).

query.description: Ranked search query. Required for `chunks` mode.

path.description: Workspace-relative file or directory; a single file may carry '#start-end' to scope results.

mode.description: chunks = ranked snippets; map = repo map from seed_files; symbol = exact definitions (name + location, no body).

limit.description: Maximum number of ranked files to return.

seed_files.description: Seed files that bias ranking. Required when `mode='map'` because repo-map mode expands outward from these files.

name: sql
description: SQL op-dispatch: schema introspection (connect/tables/schema/table/relationships/search), SQL lint, and bounded query execution (single `sql` or a `queries[]` batch). Connection auto-discovered from DATABASE_URL env or .env; pass connection to override. Live introspection/queries run on SQLite; other dialects report a driver-required note.

action.description: table/search need name; lint/query need sql or queries[].

name.description: Target table for action=table, or keyword for action=search.

sql.description: SQL string for action=lint or action=query.

queries.description: Batch for action=query: [{name, sql}, ...]. Prefer over repeated calls.

connection.description: DSN (sqlite:///path, postgresql://...). Auto-discovered from DATABASE_URL/.env if omitted.

write.description: Permit INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/DDL on action=query/lint. Off by default; reads always allowed.

name: web_fetch
description: Fetch a public HTTP/HTTPS page for research. Requests Markdown when available, converts HTML to clean Markdown by default, blocks private/local URLs, caches 5 minutes.

type.description: Return format. auto prefers Markdown and converts HTML to Markdown.
